name: Pinnacle

rewards.category: utilities, insurance, government, education, real estate, rent
rewards.displayCategory: Utility, insurance, government, education, real estate, and rent spends

domestic: Effective April 1, 2026, spends criteria tracking of Rs 1.5 Lakh per quarter is initiated to unlock domestic lounge access from July 2026 quarter onwards.
international: Effective March 13, 2025, Priority Pass lounge benefit is revised to 1 complimentary international visit per quarter.

specialSpendRules.notes: Reward Points on Rent payment transactions done through third-party merchants will be capped at 500 in a statement cycle.

joiningBenefits: Choice of Montblanc luxury merchandise (watches, writing instruments, leather goods, or eyewear)
Complimentary luxury stays at The Postcard Hotel (worth Rs 12,000)
Choice of brand and e-commerce vouchers via Vouchagram or Vouchagram Premium (including Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Swiggy, Zomato, Uber, Ola, Bata, Titan, Vero Moda, and ALDO)
Note: Welcome gifts are subject to change and only applicable upon payment of the joining fee at eligible fee points (standard joining fee of Rs 15,000)
additionalBenefits: 1 complimentary golf game and 1 complimentary lesson per month
Complimentary Auto Assist roadside emergency services (breakdown assistance, key replacement, flat tire, emergency fuel)
1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations in India
Travel insurance cover including lost/delayed baggage, passport loss, lost ticket, and missed connection
additionalDetails: Cash redemption is capped at 7,500 reward points per calendar month
Minimum 500 reward points required for cash credit redemption
Rent reward points capped at 500 per statement cycle

selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to IndusInd Bank approval criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-05-30
Effective March 13, 2025, Priority Pass lounge benefit is revised to 1 complimentary international visit per quarter.
Effective March 13, 2025, golf benefit is revised to 1 complimentary game and 1 complimentary lesson per month.
Effective April 1, 2026, spends criteria tracking of Rs 1.5 Lakh per quarter is initiated to unlock domestic lounge access from July 2026 quarter onwards.
Reward points on rent transactions capped at 500 per statement cycle.
Redemption towards Club Vistara discontinued effective Oct 31, 2024. Redemption towards InterMiles discontinued effective Jan 21, 2025.
